overview: Vidyamandir is a bilingual (English & Bengali) e-commerce bookshop for a local shop in Purba Bardhaman, West Bengal. It features a large book catalogue with 500+ seed books, bulk import for 1 crore+ books, flash sales, cart, wishlist, orders, reviews, Q&A, admin analytics, and AI-powered enquiry responses.
features: 500+ bilingual book catalogue with secondary indices for 1 crore scale
Bulk import API accepting 1,000 books per batch with ISBN deduplication
Genre, language, price, and rating filters with O(1) lookups via stable indices
Bestseller cache with auto-refresh after import and on-demand admin refresh
Admin bulk import UI with JSON paste and file upload
AI-powered enquiry chatbox with email and SMS auto-replies
Admin panel with 9 tabs: analytics, products, flash sales, orders, enquiries, reviews, returns, promo codes, reports
